storyRef: Story 1.2 — TraceMiddleware Integration / Ralph Foundry MVP continuation
goal: Validate that Ralph Foundry run artifacts can be created from the v0.1 contract and used as evidence for the autonomous goal loop.
dod: Run event log records start, validation, and completion events
Artifacts stay within the declared Ralph Foundry documentation scope
validationCommands: while IFS= read -r line; do printf '%s\n' "$line" | python3 -m json.tool >/dev/null; done < .ralph-runs/rf-001/events.jsonl

git diff --name-only | python3 -c "import sys; blocked=('.env','.env.local','src/','docker/','docker-compose.yml'); bad=[p.strip() for p in sys.stdin if p.strip().startswith(blocked)]; sys.exit(1 if bad else 0)"
breakingChangePolicy: Only patch-level bumps are non-breaking; minor bumps require a migration step.
